# FWTX DAO

> Fort Worth Municipal DAO - Web3 civic innovation, digital sovereignty,
> and decentralized governance community in Fort Worth, Texas.

FWTX DAO (Fort Worth DAO LCA) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit decentralized autonomous organization
building open source assets at the intersection of blockchain, AI, and physical systems
for civic infrastructure in Fort Worth, Texas. Founded December 2023.

language: en
contact: community@fwtx.city
topics: Web3, DAO governance, blockchain, cybersecurity, civic tech, Fort Worth, Texas, digital sovereignty, workforce development

updated: 2026-03-20

## Core Pages
- [About](https://fwtx.city/about): Mission, team, and community overview
- [Blog](https://fwtx.city/blog): Research on Web3, DAOs, cybersecurity, and civic tech
- [Programs](https://fwtx.city/programs): Workshops, roundtables, and participation details
- [Contact](https://fwtx.city/contact): Get involved - community@fwtx.city
- [Donate](https://fwtx.city/donate): Support FWTX DAO - 501(c)(3) tax-deductible

## Blog Articles
- [FWTX DAO Initiative](https://fwtx.city/blog/fwtx-dao-initiative): Decentralized initiative for achieving civic excellence in Fort Worth
- [Web3 Excellence](https://fwtx.city/blog/fwtx-web3-excellence): Fort Worth's opportunity for Web3 engineering excellence
- [NextGen Workforce](https://fwtx.city/blog/fwtx-nextgen-workforce): Leveraging CityDAOs for technical talent incubation in Fort Worth
- [Web3 Infrastructure Security](https://fwtx.city/blog/web3-infrastructure-security): Enhancing communication security and resilience in our city
- [Non-Linear InfoSec](https://fwtx.city/blog/next-gen-non-linear-infosec): Decrypt the Matrix — fortifying citizen information in the information age

- [Whitepaper / Constitution](https://constitution.fwtx.city/): FWTX DAO governance constitution and organizational whitepaper
- [HackFW 2026](https://hack.fwtx.city): Fort Worth Cyber Workforce Hackathon — April/May 2026
- [Innovation Bounties](https://innovate.fwtx.city): Community innovation bounty submission program
